compiled_state.title: Delete test-locked orphans: forward_compat_probe.py, capability_check.py, cursor_snapshot.py (+ conftest citation fix)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Three rebar_reconciler modules with zero importers in src/ (static + spec_from_file_location dynamic-load sites checked); their former tests no longer exist. forward_compat_probe.py:77 still creates 'DSO forward-compat probe' Jira issues. tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/conftest.py:11-13 cites the three deleted tests as living examples — fix the docstring with real examples.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All three modules deleted
- [ ] conftest.py:8-13 example list updated to living loaders (e.g. test_jira_capability_probe.py / acli-integration.py)
- [ ] Full suite green
